patches.summary: Honor tail --follow=false by returning after the initial fetch.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged the advertised single-poll mode as unimplemented; scripts using --follow=false would otherwise hang indefinitely.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and live timeout smoke with tail protocols --follow=false completed without hanging.

patches.summary: Reuse defaultSyncResources() from workflow archive instead of duplicating the generated resource list.
patches.reason: Keeps workflow archive aligned with sync whenever the generated canonical sync resource set changes.

patches.summary: Use the full SHA256 digest for cache filenames.
patches.reason: Avoids unnecessary truncation of cache keys and maximizes collision margin for file-backed cache entries.
